inventory_scope: all XML sequences with image directories present in the local repo
fps_note: UA-DETRAC XML files in this repo do not encode FPS; benchmark protocol freezes nominal_fps=25 for image-sequence conversion and each run must record actual video FPS.

sequences.fps_source: not_present_in_xml; use protocol nominal_fps=25 for image-sequence conversion and record actual video FPS at run time
